title: Scorched Guns Brass
description: A simple addon to Scorched Guns, adding zinc and brass to the world, for those who do not use Create or other Brass related mods
body: A Very small addon to [Scorched Guns 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorched-guns-2), adding zinc ore to the world, and adding a brass blend, and brass ingots. Allowing a more consistent flow of brass for casings. Mainly for those not use Create, or other mods that add brass. Out the box compat with Immersive engineering.
